<!-- generated by .github/scripts/generate-runtime-docs.sh; do not edit by hand -->

# Rust Docker Images

Last generated: 2026-06-20

Images are published to:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/rust
```

The workflow builds every pinned Rust version for both `linux/amd64`
and `linux/arm64`.

## Variants

| Variant | Base image pattern | Tags | Contents |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `full` | `rust:<version>-bookworm` | `latest`, `1.96`, `1.96.0` | Official runtime image with Debian or default upstream tooling. |
| `alpine` | `rust:<version>-alpine` | `latest-alpine`, `1.96-alpine`, `1.96.0-alpine` | Official Alpine runtime image where upstream publishes one. |

## Tag Rules

For each exact version, CI publishes both variants:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/rust:<version>
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/rust:<version>-alpine
```

The newest patch in each release line also gets line aliases:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/rust:<line>
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/rust:<line>-alpine
```

The newest resolved version also gets latest aliases:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/rust:latest
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/rust:latest-alpine
```

## Status Meanings

| Status | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| Current | Newest pinned version on the newest pinned release line. Prefer this for new work. |
| Supported | Newest pinned version on another current pinned line. |
| Superseded | Older patch in a current pinned release line. Kept for reproducibility. |
| Deprecated | Older release line. Kept only for legacy rebuilds. |

Rust images track pinned stable Rust releases. Older versions are kept for reproducible rebuilds.

## Published Versions

| [`1.95.0`](rust/1.95.0.md) | `1.95.0` | `1.95.0-alpine` | `1.95`, `1.95-alpine` | Supported |

## Version Sources

CI refreshes this runtime from every matching upstream release git tag, then
merges those discovered versions with pinned versions in
`generic/rust/versions.yml`.
